elemental_strike.name: Elemental Strike
elemental_strike.description: Setup/Builder: A strike infused with shifting elements. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Attunement Pip.

attunement.name: Attunement
attunement.description: Setup: Shift your internal resonance. Generates 2 Attunement Pips and grants [Focused].

elemental_cataclysm.name: Elemental Cataclysm
elemental_cataclysm.description: Payoff: A violent convergence of fire, ice, and lightning. Consumes 5 Attunement Pips to deal AOE damage.

shock_cannon.name: Shock Cannon
shock_cannon.description: Payoff: A beam of concentrated electrical force. Consumes 3 Attunement Pips to deal heavy Magic damage and [Stun] for 2 ticks.

barrier_of_elements.name: Barrier of Elements
barrier_of_elements.description: Defense: A shifting shield of primal energy. Grants 50% resistance to Elemental damage for 6 ticks.

flash_freeze.name: Flash Freeze
flash_freeze.description: Defense/Disruption: Instantly drop the temperature. Applies [Chill] and [Stalled] to all in the room for 2 ticks.

aether_dash.name: Aether Dash
aether_dash.description: Mobility: Dissolve into aether to re-materialize in an adjacent room.

cinder_shower.name: Cinder Shower
cinder_shower.description: Utility: A gentle rain of sparks that reveals hidden objects and grants allies [Warmth].

elementalist_physiology.name: Elementalist Physiology
elementalist_physiology.description: Passive: Mana Shifter. You gain 10% Magic power for 10 ticks every time you switch pips or attunement states.
